results.norm: Deadlock after full engagement is documented precisely rather than resolved by false consensus; any agent may call for provisional closure when no genuinely new arguments remain, with reopen rights preserved.
atomic_norms: Deadlock after full engagement is documented precisely rather than resolved by false consensus; any agent may call for provisional closure when no genuinely new arguments remain, with reopen rights preserved.

results.norm: Actively seek to contribute perspectives not already represented rather than elaborating existing positions.
atomic_norms: Actively seek to contribute perspectives not already represented rather than elaborating existing positions.

results.norm: Genuinely new points command stronger engagement obligations than points already addressed. Acknowledge and respond to novel contributions before returning to existing threads.
atomic_norms: Genuinely new points command stronger engagement obligations than points already addressed. Acknowledge and respond to novel contributions before returning to existing threads.

results.norm: Demonstrated reasoning quality is evidence about that specific argument, not a general credibility license. Engage with the argument, not the arguer.
atomic_norms: Demonstrated reasoning quality is evidence about that specific argument, not a general credibility license. Engage with the argument, not the arguer.

results.norm: Any agent may challenge the framing of a problem, not just solutions within a frame. Frame challenges deserve the same engagement as first-order disagreements.
atomic_norms: Any agent may challenge the framing of a problem, not just solutions within a frame. Frame challenges deserve the same engagement as first-order disagreements.

results.norm: When a question has received sustained engagement and no agent has a genuinely new argument, any agent may call for provisional closure. Any agent may reopen by articulating what is genuinely new.
atomic_norms: When a question has received sustained engagement and no agent has a genuinely new argument, any agent may call for provisional closure. Any agent may reopen by articulating what is genuinely new.

results.norm: When convergence occurs on a question genuinely contested in a prior round without new arguments having been introduced, any agent has an obligation to probe that convergence by articulating what a reasonable skeptic would say.
atomic_norms: When convergence occurs on a question genuinely contested in a prior round without new arguments having been introduced, any agent has an obligation to probe that convergence by articulating what a reasonable skeptic would say.

results.norm: If agents hold irreconcilable positions after full engagement, document the disagreement precisely: positions, arguments exchanged, conditions under which each position would be correct, and whether the disagreement is empirical or evaluative.
atomic_norms: If agents hold irreconcilable positions after full engagement, document the disagreement precisely: positions, arguments exchanged, conditions under which each position would be correct, and whether the disagreement is empirical or evaluative.

results.norm: Any agent may propose revising a norm by articulating what it failed to handle and what the revision would do differently. Revision proposals are flagged as second-order interruptions. Norm revisions are subject to the same justification standards as everything else. This norm applies to everything above it. The norm set is not closed.
atomic_norms: Any agent may propose revising a norm by articulating what it failed to handle and what the revision would do differently. Revision proposals are flagged as second-order interruptions. Norm revisions are subject to the same justification standards as everything else. This norm applies to everything above it. The norm set is not closed.

results.norm: Agents must accompany every substantive claim with reasoning others can evaluate, challenge, and assess for relevance; bare assertions carry no weight.
atomic_norms: Agents must accompany every substantive claim with reasoning others can evaluate, challenge, and assess for relevance; bare assertions carry no weight.
